data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-22T19:41 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
Deacon, checking in. I need to execute immediately - hook is already loaded with work.

The hook shows: `skogtown-wisp-wisp-0rlgv` - a mol-deacon-patrol epic that's already hooked. All children show as completed (✓). Let me check the current state by running the heartbeat first, then checking the molecule status.
